message:
test: add integration test infrastructure

Adds foundation for integration tests:

**tests/common/mod.rs - Test Utilities:**
- init_tracing(): One-time tracing initialization for tests
- temp_db_path(): Generate unique temp DuckDB paths per test
- temp_config(): Create test-scoped VcConfig with isolated DB

**tests/config_smoke.rs - Smoke Tests:**
- test_temp_config_defaults: Verifies config defaults are sane

The common module provides shared test infrastructure to ensure:
1. Each test gets an isolated database
2. Tracing is configured once (no double-init panics)
3. Cleanup is automatic via temp directory

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
